resources.string: By continuing you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy

Skill Stream is an app-based platform designed to streamline online learning through a personalized and automated approach. It offers features such as customizable learning paths, auto-generated study materials, real-time progress tracking, and course recommendations based on user preferences via intelligent algorithms.

These tools empower learners to efficiently achieve their educational goals. The platform also includes study schedule reminders, progress tracking with visual graphs and reports, and interactive quizzes to enhance the learning experience.
Focused on accessibility and user-friendliness, Skill Streamprovides a seamless and adaptable experience tailored to individual learning styles and needs.
• React.js for a responsive interface\n• Node.js for robust backend operations\n• MongoDB for scalable data management
• Live tutoring sessions\n• Collaborative study groups\n• Dedicated mobile application
